The problem

Revenue exists. Profit doesn't.

Behind most struggling centres is an owner who started out to help people, now stretched thin by everything except care. Capable centres, worn down by the business. Three reasons:

01

Bleeding EBITDA

Equipment at 30–40% utilisation, fixed costs that don't move with revenue, price wars with aggregators and hospital labs.

02

Can't scale

Zero brand recall, no standardised SOPs, no tech backbone. Every new branch is built from scratch.

03

Ops chaos

Ad-hoc procurement with no leverage, high staff attrition, reactive compliance, patient experience an afterthought.

What you get

What changes when NDIAN runs it.

A national brand

From "local, forgettable" to a name patients recognise and trust — signage, digital presence, the lot.

Full software stack

Booking front-end, LIS, RIS/PACS, CRM & billing — plus the NDIAN patient app with Smart Reports & Health Score. Everything a diagnostics & imaging centre needs to run.

Pricing & packages

Optimised, standardised pricing and ready-made test & scan packages that convert — set by people who run centres.

Marketing & lead generation

Digital campaigns, doctor engagement and corporate tie-ups that fill your slots — demand you can't generate alone.

20–40% procurement savings

Centralised buying power on reagents and consumables — costs you could never negotiate alone.

You own it, we run it

From firefighting daily to a monthly review. You keep ownership and capex; NDIAN delivers the performance.

How it works

Live in about four weeks.

Built for independent labs, ultrasound spokes, and CT and MRI hubs — from first conversation to a NDIAN-run centre, without disrupting a single patient day.

pathology & collection

MRI hubs

1

Apply

Tell us about your centre below — modality, accreditation, capacity, and where you want to take it. We respond within 48 hours.

2

Discovery visit & P&L review · WEEK 1

We walk your floor and sit with your numbers. Your current revenue becomes the baseline you keep — then we agree the model and terms together.

3

Agreement & compliance · WEEK 2

Sign the operating agreement. We verify NABL / PC-PNDT / AERB and lock the transition plan with you — dates, team, signage, systems.

4

Transition · WEEKS 2–4

Our operating team moves in: your staff onboarded on NDIAN SOPs, booking + LIS / RIS / PACS + billing installed, procurement shifted to network rates, centre re-branded — while your centre keeps running.

5

Go live as NDIAN · WEEK 4

NDIAN demand switches on — digital campaigns, doctor engagement, corporate tie-ups. You step back to a monthly owner review of revenue and utilisation.

For the families you serve

Built for the family, not the patient.

NDIAN is the only health app most households actually need — because it remembers, summarises, and rewards. Independent labs plug in. Doctors plug in. Patients book in two taps. And they keep coming back — to your centre.

Smart Reports

Reports they understand

Lab & imaging results auto-ingested and rebuilt as plain-language, trended charts. The PDF is still there — but no one needs it.

Health Score

One number per member

A composite score across every visit and every family member. Turns "my reports" into "my health" — and drives repeat testing.

Family & rewards

Money saved, profiles

Book for parents and spouse, track cumulative savings, keep each member's history separate. The strongest retention lever in health apps.

Your exit, when you want it

A standalone lab has no buyer. A network does.

You poured years into building this. Yet most independent owners have no real way out — no buyer, no succession plan, a centre that's hard to value alone. Joining NDIAN makes your centre part of a scaled, branded, investable network — so the thing you built has a future, and a real exit when you want one.

Buyout option

A planned buyout

Once your centre performs on the NDIAN standard, we can acquire it at a pre-agreed multiple. A clean, scheduled exit — not a fire sale.

Network multiple

Sell at the network's multiple

A standalone centre trades at ~4–6× EBITDA; one running on the NDIAN standard inside a branded network sells at 12–20×. Same centre, far higher exit value.

Succession & sale

Exit on your timeline

Step back from daily operations now, exit fully when you choose. As part of a multi-site network you're attractive to PE and strategic buyers you'd never reach alone.

NDIAN Hours

Your quiet hours, full of patients.

Every centre has quiet hours. A scanner sitting idle from 2–4 PM is fixed cost with nothing to show for it. NDIAN Hours turns that quiet time into affordable scans for patients who'd otherwise put it off — without touching your busy windows.

The insight

You lose nothing on a slot you'd have run empty. The patient pays 30–50% less, the slot fills, and someone who'd have delayed a scan gets seen sooner. And when you're at capacity, overflow reporting routes to pooled radiologists (~30-min TAT), so no one waits.

Common questions

Partner FAQ.

Ownership & control
Do I keep ownership of my centre?

Yes. In Fully Managed and Branded Partner you keep 100% ownership, premises, equipment and capex — NDIAN operates or supports it, never takes it over. We never require you to sell.

Money
How does NDIAN make money — what do I pay?

By model: Fully Managed — NDIAN runs the centre and earns from its performance; you keep every rupee you earn today, guaranteed, plus a share of the growth. Branded Partner (opens in Phase 2) — a 6–8% brand & platform licence, in line with what established healthcare franchises charge, plus 15–20% only on the bookings NDIAN brings you. You never pay a demand fee on your own patients. We earn when we deliver.

What does it cost to join?

₹0 onboarding fee for the pilot cohort — no platform fee, no upfront lock-in. You keep your own capex; in turnarounds we can bring capital, structured separately.

What if my centre is loss-making right now?

That's exactly who Fully Managed is built for. We bring brand, demand, 20–40% procurement savings and operating discipline to turn it around — and we're paid mainly when performance improves.

What you get
How do you bring me patients?

Digital marketing, doctor engagement, corporate tie-ups, idle-slot discounts (NDIAN Hours), and a patient app that keeps families coming back — legal, transparent platform demand with no referral kickbacks.

What happens to my staff?

We train and retain your team, give them SOPs and career paths, and reduce attrition. We're not a layoff machine — strong centres run on good people.

Compliance & exit
Is the demand legal? What about referral commissions?

Yes. The NMC bars doctors from taking referral commissions — that grey economy is a licence risk. NDIAN demand is platform demand: transparent routing and marketing, not a kickback.

How long is the contract, and can I exit?

Pilot partnerships are a short rolling term with a 30-day exit either side, non-exclusive. We also offer planned exits later — a pre-agreed buyout, or help selling at the network's valuation.
